name: ticketingapp-performance-tests
description: k6 load and concurrency tests for TicketingApp reservation integrity.

scripts.docker:same-seat: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.k6.yml --profile tools run --rm k6 run performance-tests/scenarios/same-seat-reservation.js
scripts.docker:observability: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.k6.yml --profile observability up -d prometheus grafana
